name: Gumdrop Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Small gumdrops, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat all ingredients except the gumdrops and nuts on low speed for 15 seconds.
2. Increase the speed to medium and continue beating, scraping the sides of the bowl constantly, until thoroughly combined, about 30 seconds.
3. Stir in the chopped nuts and cut gumdrops.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 5 inch loaf pan, filled only on the bottom.
5. Bake at 350°F for 60 to 65 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Loosen the sides of the loaf from the pan.
7. Remove the bread from the pan and allow it to cool completely on a wire rack.
8. For best results, wrap tightly and refrigerate at least 24 hours before slicing. Do not refrigerate for more than one week.
